# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: server
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: client
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: linkerd-namespace
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: "networking.linkerd.io/v1alpha2"
kind: LinkerdServer
metadata:
  name: server-service
  namespace: linkerd-namespace
spec:
  hostname: server-hostname
  protocol: HTTP
  tlsProfile: external
---
apiVersion: "networking.linkerd.io/v1alpha2"
kind: LinkerdAuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: authz
  namespace: linkerd-namespace
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: ServiceAccount
    name: server
  from:
    - targetRef:
        kind: "*"
      action: ALLOW
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: linkerd-namespace
spec:
  host: server-hostname
  trafficPolicy:
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: server-service
  namespace: linkerd<｜begin▁of▁sentence｜>sio
spec:
  hosts:
    - '*'
  gateways:
    - server-gateway
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
      route:
        - destination:
            host: server-hostname
